body.title: Define skill telemetry contract schema (forget-flags + improvement metrics)
body.result: TypedDict schema (SkillContract, ViolationRecord, OutcomeRecord) in skill_telemetry.py; palace node at theigors/skill-telemetry/schema
body.description:
Define the two-field telemetry contract format and violation log record schema that all subsequent telemetry work references.

**Proposed shape:** Palace node at `theigors/skill-telemetry/schema` defining the contract format. Python TypedDict in lab/claudecode/skill_telemetry.py:
  SkillContract(forget_flags: list[ForgotFlag], improvement_metrics: list[Metric])
  ViolationRecord(ts, skill, flag_name, context, session_id)
  OutcomeRecord(ts, skill, postconditions_met: dict[str, bool], session_id)
No runtime behavior yet — spec only. Everything else gates on this.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/skill_telemetry.py (new), palace node (new)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (JSONL flat file), docs-live-in-code
**Scope boundary:** Schema definition only — no logger, no retrofit, no rollup
**Test plan:** Unit tests for SkillContract/ViolationRecord serialization round-trip
